name: Southwest Appetizer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Sour cream, can use light
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese, ricotta and cheddar cheese with taco seasoning.
2. Add sour cream.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Fold in chilies and red pepper.
5. Pour mixture into greased 9-inch springform pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until center of cake is firm.
7. Cool on wire rack for 30 minutes.
8. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
9. Just before serving, spread salsa over top of cake and garnish with parsley and scallions.
10. Serve with chips or crackers. Freezes well.
